# Luis Ortiz — Senior Software Engineer

> Senior full-stack software engineer based in Guatemala, specializing in React Native, TypeScript, and Node.js. Core engineer on a flagship mobile app used by millions; available for select project-based work.

Luis Ortiz builds production web and mobile products end to end — customer-facing mobile features, the platform layers beneath them (in-app WebViews, third-party SDKs, observability, accessibility), and the Node/NestJS backends that support them. Bilingual in English and Spanish.

## Profiles
- [Portfolio](https://www.lfortiz.com/): Full portfolio, selected work, experience, and contact form.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ChutLuis): Open-source projects and source code.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/luis-ortiz-3b5454195/): Professional history and background.

## Focus areas
- Mobile: React Native, Expo, feature-flagged releases, in-app WebView systems.
- Full-stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL.
- Cloud & tooling: AWS, Docker, GraphQL.

## Contact
- [Email](mailto:me@lfortiz.com): Project inquiries and select freelance work.
